title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Zingiber officinale, also known as ginger, essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties. Ginger oil contains compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have been shown to reduce inflammation in the gut. It also has antioxidant properties, which help protect the body from oxidative stress caused by inflammation.
